case_title: TERESITA CALONSAG-WATERS VS. LISHA MEI ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 66583652) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALONSAG-WATERS, TERESITA

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 66583652) TO PLAINTIFF CALONSAG-WATERS, TERESITA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-08-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-08-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REFUND FROM THE ELIMINATION OF LOCAL SURHARGES (GC 70625) OF $15.00
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67458153)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-10-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
